narrative:
Oak Run (precinct in Madison County) has 406 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.4 percentage points.
